what_it_is.headline: Treatment serum
what_it_is.body: 50 ML / 1.7 FL OZ We all know retinal is effective, but the greatest setback to formulating and producing a product with this material is its oxidative instability. To ensure that our product maintains its potency through its shelf life we assayed the retinal under accelerated conditions.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Formula angle
why_it_stands_out.body: 7 FL OZ We all know retinal is effective, but the greatest setback to formulating and producing a product with this material is its oxidative instability.

pairing_notes: Apply before moisturizer; follow with SPF if used in the morning.

watchouts.label: Start slowly if your skin is sensitive to retinoids.
